summary: Website project with contact page updates. Removing redundant cost references from text.

existing_features.title: In ContactPage.tsx, within the 'Wichtig zu wissen' section, remove the phrase '– ganz ohne Kosten' (including the em dash) wherever it appears, leaving the surrounding sentence intact.

In ContactPage.tsx, within the 'Termin buchen' section, change the sentence 'Buchen Sie direkt online entweder das kostenlose Kennenlerngespräch (30 Minuten – kostenlos)' to 'Buchen Sie direkt online entweder das kostenlose Kennenlerngespräch (30 Minuten)'.
